title: Senior Software Engineer - Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Bengaluru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
